Class-Sorcerer — Female Stout Halfling Sorcerer: 20
Strength: 14 (+2) Dexterity: 16 (+3) Constitution: 11 (+0) Intelligence: 12 (+1) Wisdom: 15 (+2) Charisma: 18 (+4)
Background: Folk Hero Alignment: Chaotic Neutral Deity: The Everlight (NG)
Experience: 539275/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Small Speed: 25 Carry/Lift: 210/420
Ability Notes:
Actor: +1 Charisma
Halfling Ability Adjustment: +2 Dexterity
Stout Halfling Ability Adjustment: +1 Constitution
Halfling Nimbleness: Can move through a space occupied by a larger creature
Sigilic Augmentation: Can use a bonus action to discharge 1 rune, gaining advantage on Strength, Dexterity, or Constitution checks until the start of the next turn; can discharge an additional rune each turn to extend the effect
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +6
Feat Count: General: 5 Selectable Feature Count: Sorcerer (Metamagic): 4; Sorcerer (Sorcerous Origin): 1
Feats: Actor; Dual Wielder; Magic Initiate (Bard); Magic Initiate (Sorcerer); Tough Stout Halfling Features: Brave; Halfling Ability Adjustment; Halfling Nimbleness; Language (Common; Halfling); Lucky (Halfling); Stout Halfling Ability Adjustment; Stout Resilience Sorcerer Features: Arcane Exemplar Form; Careful Spell; Essence Runes; Font Of Magic; Glyphs Of Aegis; Manifest Inscriptions; Metamagic; Quickened Spell; Runechild; Runic Torrent; Save Proficiency (Constitution; Charisma); Sigilic Augmentation; Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Arcana, Deception, Insight, Intimidation, Persuasion, Religion); Sorcerous Origin; Sorcerous Restoration; Spellcasting (Sorcerer); Subtle Spell; Twinned Spell; Weapon Proficiency (Dagger; Dart; Sling; Quarterstaff; Light Crossbow) Folk Hero Features: Rustic Hospitality; Skill Proficiency (Animal Handling; Survival); Tool Proficiency (Vehicles (Land); Choose 1 from any Artisan's Tools)
Feature Notes:
Metamagic: 4 selections
Sorcerous Origin: 1 selection
Lucky (Halfling): Can reroll 1s on attacks, ability checks, and saves
Rustic Hospitality: Can receive shelter from common folk
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +3 Insight: (wis) +8 Performance: (cha) +4
Animal Handling: (wis) +8 Intimidation: (cha) +4 Persuasion: (cha) +4
Arcana: (int) +1 Investigation: (int) +1 Religion: (int) +1
Athletics: (str) +2 Medicine: (wis) +2 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +3
Deception: (cha) +10 Nature: (int) +1 Stealth: (dex) +3
History: (int) +1 Perception: (wis) +2 Survival: (wis) +8
Skill Proficiency: Animal Handling; Deception; Insight; Survival
Tool Proficiency: Jeweler's Tools; Vehicles (Land)
Languages: Common; Halfling
Skill Notes:
Actor: Has advantage on Deception and Performance to impersonate another person and can mimic others' speech or sounds (successful Insight vs. Deception detects)
Manifest Inscriptions: R15' Can discharge 1 rune to cause hidden glyphs to glow for 1 rd
Combat
Hit Points: 105 Initiative: +3 Armor Class: 13
Weapon Proficiency: Dagger; Dart; Light Crossbow; Quarterstaff; Sling
Armor: None Shield: Weapons: Dagger (+9 1d4+3 P R20/60); Dart (+9 1d4+3 P R20/60); Sling (+9 1d4+3 B R30/120); Unarmed Strike (+8 1+2 B)
Combat Notes:
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +3
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +3
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +3
Strength Attack Adjustment: +2
Strength Damage Adjustment: +2
Tough: +40 Hit Points
Dual Wielder: +1 Armor Class when wielding two melee weapons/Can use two-weapon fighting with any one-handed weapons/Can draw or stow two one-handed weapons simultaneously
Glyphs Of Aegis: Can use a reaction in response to taking damage to discharge runes, negating 1d6 HP of damage for each; touch can transfer the protection of 1 rune to another creature for 1 hr
Small: Has disadvantage on attacks with heavy weapons
Save Proficiency: Charisma; Constitution
Save: Charisma: +10; Constitution: +6; Dexterity: +3; Intelligence: +1; Strength: +2; Wisdom: +2
Save Notes:
Brave: Has advantage vs. frightened
Stout Resilience: Has advantage vs. poison and resistance to poison
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: B0: 2; B: 1; S0: 8; S: 16 Spell Slots: S1: 4; S2: 3; S3: 3; S4: 3; S5: 3; S6: 2; S7: 2; S8: 1; S9: 1 Attack: B: +10; S: +10 Spell DC: B: 18; S: 18
Spells:
Acid Splash (S0 Conj): (Action) R60' Inflicts 4d6 HP acid (save Dexterity negates) on a single target or 2 adjacent targets
Cloud Of Daggers (S2 Conj): (Action) R60' 5' cube inflicts 4d4 HP slashing for concentration up to 1 min (+Level inflicts +2d4 HP)
Color Spray (S1 Illu): (Action) 15' cone inflicts blinded on 6d10 HP of targets for 1 rd (+Level affects +2d10 HP of targets)
Cone Of Cold (S5 Evoc): (Action) 60' cone inflicts 8d8 HP cold (save Constitution half) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Confusion (S4 Ench): (Action) R90' Creatures in a 10' radius lose reactions and randomly: 10% wander; 50% do nothing; 20% attack an adjacent creature; 20% act normally (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level increases the radius by 5')
Crown Of Madness (S2 Ench): (Action) R120' Self can direct the target humanoid's attacks (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Disguise Self (B1 Illu): (Action) Changes the appearance of self body and clothing for 1 hr; physical investigation detects the illusion
Disintegrate (S6 Tran): (Action) R60' Inflicts 10d6+40 HP force and turns the target to dust if reduced to 0 HP (save Dexterity negates), or disintegrates a Large or smaller object or magical force (+Level inflicts +3d6 HP)
Dominate Beast (S4 Ench): (Action) R60' Target beast obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; active fighting gives advantage, and damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level extends the duration to 10 min, 1 hr, or 8 hr at level 5, 6, or 7)
Fear (S3 Illu): (Action) Creatures in a 30' cone drop held objects and flee (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd when out of sight of self end) for concentration up to 1 min
Feather Fall (S1 Tran): (Reaction) R60' Causes 5 falling targets to slow to 60' per rd for 1 min
Fireball (S3 Evoc): (Action) R150' 20' radius inflicts 8d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and ignites unattended flammable objects (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Friends (B0 Ench): (Action) Self gains advantage on Charisma checks with a non-hostile target for concentration up to 1 min; the target becomes hostile afterward
Friends (S0 Ench): (Action) Self gains advantage on Charisma checks with a non-hostile target for concentration up to 1 min; the target becomes hostile afterward
Incendiary Cloud (S8 Conj): (Action) R150' 20' radius becomes heavily obscured, inflicts 10d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half), and moves away 10' per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Lightning Bolt (S3 Evoc): (Action) 100'x5' line inflicts 8d6 HP lightning (save Dexterity half) and ignites unattended flammable objects (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Mage Armor (S1 Abju): (Action) Willing, unarmored touched gains Armor Class 13 + Dexterity modifier for 8 hr; the spell ends if the target dons armor
Mage Hand (S0 Conj): (Action) R30' Spectral hand performs minor tasks, moving up to 10 lb, for 1 min
Mending (S0 Tran): (Minute) Touch repairs a break or tear up to 1' long
Message (S0 Tran): (Action) R120' Self and target can hold a whispered conversation for 1 rd; can be cast through objects, but 3' of wood, 1' of stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Meteor Swarm (S9 Evoc): (Action) R1 mile 4 40' radius areas each inflict 20d6 HP fire and 20d6 HP bludgeoning (save Dexterity half) and ignite unattended flammable objects
Minor Illusion (S0 Illu): (Action) R30' Creates the sound of 1 creature or a 5' cube image (Investigation detects) for 1 min or until cast again
Move Earth (S6 Tran): (Action) R120' Reshapes a 40' cube of earth each 10 min for concentration up to 2 hr
Poison Spray (S0 Conj): (Action) R10' Inflicts 4d12 HP poison (save Constitution negates)
Polymorph (S4 Tran): (Action) R60' Transforms the target creature into a beast (save Wisdom negates; shapechangers automatically succeed) for concentration up to 1 hr or until reduced to 0 hit points
Ray Of Frost (S0 Evoc): (Action) R60' Ranged spell inflicts 4d8 HP cold and -10' Speed until the start of the next turn
Ray Of Sickness (S1 Necr): (Action) R60' Ranged spell inflicts 2d8 HP poison and poisoned for 1 rd (save Constitution HP only) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Reverse Gravity (S7 Tran): (Action) R100' Items in a 50' radius, 100' high cylinder fall upward for concentration up to 1 min
Seeming (S5 Illu): (Action) R30' Changes the appearance of targets (save Charisma negates; contact or Investigation detects) for 8 hr
Shatter (S2 Evoc): (Action) R60' 10' radius inflicts 3d8 HP thunder (save Constitution half; inorganic creatures have disadvantage) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Telekinesis (S5 Tran): (Action) R60' Self can mentally restrain and move 1 Huge creature or 1000 lb object 30' (save Strength negates) each rd for concentration up to 10 min
Teleport (S7 Conj): (Action) R10' Teleports an unattended 10' cube object or self and 8 willing creatures any distance; greater familiarity with the destination improves accuracy
True Strike (B0 Divi): (Action) R30' Self gains advantage on the next attack on the target within 1 rd
Witch Bolt (S1 Evoc): (Action) R30' Ranged spell inflicts 1d12 HP lightning per rd for concentration up to 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d12 HP initial)
Magic Notes:
Arcane Exemplar Form: Can use a bonus action and discharge 6 runes to gain a 40' fly Speed, +2 spell DC, and resistance to spell damage, and to regain hit points equal to the spell's level from casting, for 3 rd once per long rest, suffering incapacity for 1 rd afterward; discharging additional runes extends the effects for 1 rd each
Careful Spell: Can spend 1 sorcery point to give 4 creatures a successful save on a self spell
Essence Runes: Spending sorcery points charges an equal number of runes (maximum 20), and one can be charged via an action when none are charged and sorcery points are exhausted; 5 charged runes emit a 5' bright light, and remaining charged runes become inert after a long rest
Font Of Magic: Can use 20 sorcery points per long rest and can use a bonus action to convert between sorcery points and spell slots
Magic Initiate (Bard): Knows 2 Bard cantrips and can cast a chosen B1 spell without expending a spell slot once per long rest
Magic Initiate (Sorcerer): Knows 2 Sorcerer cantrips and can cast a chosen S1 spell without expending a spell slot once per long rest
Quickened Spell: Can spend 2 sorcery points to use a bonus action to cast a 1-action spell
Runic Torrent: Can discharge runes equal to a spell's level to overcome target resistance and immunity
Sorcerous Restoration: Taking a short rest restores 4 sorcery points
Spellcasting (Sorcerer): Can cast spells from the sorcerer spell list; regains expended spell slots after a long rest
Subtle Spell: Can spend 1 sorcery point to cast a spell without somatic or verbal components
Twinned Spell: Can spend sorcery points equal to the level of a spell to add a second target
